name: high-level
description: Reads HighLevel (Go HighLevel / LeadConnector) contacts, opportunities, pipelines, custom fields, and form submissions for a location through the HighLevel REST API.

risk.read: external HighLevel (LeadConnector) API read of contact, opportunity, pipeline, custom field, and form submission data for a configured location
risk.approval: none; read-only, no obviously-safe reverse-ETL writes
